sft_chat.description: Supervised fine-tuning with chat template (messages array)

messages.content: What is the capital of France?

example.chosen: Quantum entanglement is a phenomenon where two particles become correlated...
example.rejected: Quantum stuff is when particles are connected or something.

grpo.description: Group Relative Policy Optimization (prompt + verifiable reward)
grpo.note: Reward is computed externally (code executor, math verifier) — not stored in file

common: One JSON object per line (JSONL format)
sft_chat: Must have at least 'user' and 'assistant' roles
System message optional but must be first if present
dpo: chosen and rejected must differ meaningfully
chosen must be clearly better, not just longer

__faion_header__.purpose: JSONL format reference (sft_chat / dpo / completion) cross-framework.
